summary: Tested All Reports feature (GET /api/all-reports). All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend acceptance criteria verified. The page displays correctly with Bulgarian translations, summary cards (206h total, 204h normal, 2h overtime, 1727 EUR), status breakdown chips, filterable/sortable table with 35 rows, detail modal with value disclaimer.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (35 reports in database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Reports feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/all-reports returns correct data structure with items, total, summary (hours/overtime/value/by_status). 2) Supports all filters: date_from, date_to, report_status, smr, only_overtime. 3) Supports sorting by date/worker/hours/value/status. 4) Each report item has all required fields: date, worker_name, site_name, smr_type, hours, normal_hours, overtime_hours, hourly_rate, labor_value, report_status, payroll_status. 5) Summary has total_hours=206, normal_hours=204, overtime_hours=2, total_value=1727 EUR, by_status breakdown (DRAFT=25, APPROVED=7, SUBMITTED=2, REJECTED=1). 6) Frontend page renders with Bulgarian title 'Всички отчети', 4 summary cards, status breakdown chips, table with all 11 columns. 7) Status badges use correct colors: Чернова (gray), Подаден (blue), Одобрен (green), Отхвърлен (red). 8) Detail modal opens on eye button click and shows full report info with value disclaimer. 9) Filters panel toggles correctly with filter count badge. 10) Sidebar shows 'Всички отчети' under 'Дневник СМР' group. 11) Page is admin-only (protected by AdminRoute).
